markdownRemark.html:
Marriage and Family Life

  • Become a massage master
  • Have habit of having ten-minute talks with spouse where you allow her to pour out her feelings and take the time to really make her feel understood and loved
  • When you have a family, spend at least one meal a week personally with one member (wife, kids) or do something fun (date)

  • PE Enhancements

    • Male deer exercise
    • Intense kegels to get rock hard
  • Personal chefs and grocery delivery? -> offering room for college students in exchange for housekeeping and babysitting

Traveling

  • When you and P travel, have a set of postcards for every home you stay at

Time Contingent Things

  • PB & J

    • Buy P a Pusheen before fourth term of training
